name: The Back Nine Golf | Cedar City, UT
address: 1198 Sage Dr Ste B, Cedar City, UT 84720
about: The Back Nine Golf in Cedar City, Utah offers a golf simulation experience in an indoor setting. The venue provides a modern environment for golfers to practice and play virtual courses. With its central location in Cedar City, it serves as a convenient option for both locals and visitors looking to enjoy golf regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient indoor golf experience accessible year-round
Professional golf simulation technology for realistic play
Suitable for both casual rounds and serious practice sessions
Great option for groups and corporate events
Ideal for tourists visiting Cedar City

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food options available for golfers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, though you can bring your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available at the venue, but BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole rounds take approximately 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue appears suitable for families, though specific children's amenities are not detailed.
